positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial biome composition. Central focus on intertwined glowing flora and geometric patterns representing cosmic energy. The primary palette utilizes deep midnight indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, iridescent teal, and luminous gold accents. Features silhouetted, graceful, mythical forest animals (like stylized cervids or owls) integrated seamlessly into the environment. Style should be a blend of intricate etching, elegant linocut, and digital watercolor, ensuring strong silhouettes, maximal contrast, and a perfect, repeatable pattern quality. Designed specifically for high-end apparel textile printing, volumetric and ethereal lighting, art deco influence, fantasy.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, low resolution, grainy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, asymmetrical, realistic photography
